title: Derlac
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Derlacs''' were large oceanic creatures that grew up to fifteen meters in length. They lived in herds, grazing on aquatic plants and insects near the oceans of [[Shaum Hii/Legends|Shaum Hii]]. The [[Kian'thar]] herded derlacs as [[Cattle/Legends|cattle]], following them on their [[bentail]] mounts and using [[derlac whistle]]s to call them. Kian'thar ranchers branded the derlacs in their herds, but otherwise let them roam around the oceans freely until it was time to bring them to market. A Kian'thar family usually took about one dozen derlacs to [[cattle market]] per year.

Derlac meat was Shaum Hii's main export.
